_doc: The coherence disposition catalogue for built-but-unwired /api routes — a DECLARED registry the reachability gate reads (was a hardcoded _ORPHAN_ROUTES dict in suite.py until 2026-06-08; promoted to declared data per the no-hardcoding rule + as the first finding-store step). Each entry: route -> {tag, note}. tag = finish/defer disposition: to_wire (built, should have an FE caller) | to_build_ui (needs a screen — a Claude Design target) | voice_owned (the voice session's lane) | backend_only (legitimately no FE — agent/operator/internal). A route NOT here that has no real consumer is a NEW disconnection -> the gate fails. This generalises later into the persisted dispositioned finding-store (the coherence substrate).

/api/cognition/role/dry_run.note: authoring UI — dry-run a role in isolation

/api/cognition/rule/validate.note: authoring UI — validate a rule (closed grammar)

/api/cognition/preview_turn.note: authoring UI — preview a full turn

/api/knobs.note: G8.1 dynamic per-model knob surface — a CognitionView/config input

/api/run-stats.note: G7 run-record rollups (learning-by-use) — a CognitionView input

/api/graphs.note: C4 list every graph — a graph-picker FE

/api/chats.note: I7 the chat thread at a ui:// address — an addressed-thread view

/api/attach-chat.note: I7 attach a chat turn to a ui:// address

/api/capture-idea.note: A4 capture a fleeting idea — a capture affordance

/api/decision.note: a decision as an audit view over the log — an audit surface

/api/self-change-log.note: the self-modification audit ledger — an audit surface

/api/checkpoint.note: operator restore point — an undo/restore affordance (or operator/CLI)

/api/context.note: GET /api/context — the address-keyed context bundle; backend BUILT + tested, the FE consumer (an addressed-context inspector) is DESIGNED-not-built (StudioSeams). Surfaced by the AST consumer-fix 2026-06-08 (was false-wired by a prose mention).

/api/scope.note: S3 ui://->code://->scope resolver route; built + tested via SUITE.resolve_scope, no real HTTP consumer yet. Surfaced by the AST consumer-fix (was false-wired by a check()-label + docstring mention).

/api/mockup-feedback.note: legacy mockup feedback capture — the in-app studio surface persists feedback via /api/annotate (the shared organ); the standalone STUDIO.html still uses this. Surfaced by the AST consumer-fix (was false-wired by FE comments saying it's RETIRED).

/api/mockup-feedback/status.note: studio feedback-edit loop — flip a feedback entry applied/dismissed

/api/surface-review.note: agents/flows surface a review item here; not an FE action

/api/voice/load.note: load a TTS voice — voice session

/api/voice/unload.note: unload a TTS voice — voice session

/api/voice/ear/load.note: load an STT ear — voice session

/api/voice/ear/unload.note: unload an STT ear — voice session

/api/voice/turn.note: a voice-trial/loop turn — voice session. Surfaced by the AST consumer-fix (was false-wired by a print-string + comment mention).
